no: Skills and Abilities by morpheus562. Class/kit ability tweaks, proficiency overhaul, and new HLAs. Several components require EEex. Install after SCS, before EET_End.

conflicts.reason: Proficiency and ability tweaks overlap with M&G's revised combat mechanics
conflicts.theirComps: #225 Revised Archers #280 Revised Backstabbing #290 Revised THAC0

conflicts.reason: Both modify the Archer kit. S&A #170 updates Archer bonuses; A7 Improved Archer completely overhauls the kit. Use one or the other.
METweaks class ability and proficiency tweaks overlap with Skills and Abilities
conflicts.myComps: #141 #142 #143 Fighter multi-class pips #300 Weapon Styles #311 #312 #313 Proficiency Progression
conflicts.theirComps: #500 #505 #510 Proficiency rate #1000 Monk Deflect Missiles #1800 Assassin backstab

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks weapon proficiency, styles, and grandmastery changes overlap with Skills and Abilities
conflicts.myComps: #141 #142 #143 Fighter pips #300 Weapon Styles #311 #312 #313 Proficiency Progression #400 2H Strength Bonus
conflicts.theirComps: #2060 Weapon Styles #2160 #2161 #2162 #2163 #2164 Weapon Proficiency #2200 #2210 #2211 Grandmastery #2440 Bonus APR

conflicts.reason: Component-level analysis: (1) SnA cn:80 (Paladin Abilities) vs ToF cn:40190/40300 — CONFLICT: both add Smite Evil and Disease Immunity to paladin CLABs with different resources, causing double abilities. Pick one paladin system. (2) SnA cn:141/143 (Fighter Pips) vs ToF cn:81100 — install SnA before ToF; ToF reads WEAPPROF.2DA into Lua before wiping it, capturing SnA's pip changes. (3) SnA cn:150 (Fighter Abilities) vs ToF cn:60100 (Feats) — independent, different delivery systems (CLAB vs Lua feats). (4) SnA cn:180 (Bard Songs), cn:400 (2H Strength), cn:750 (Concentration), cn:50 (Wizard Slayer), cn:12 (Bard Skills) — all independent, no ToF overlap on these files.
conflicts.myComps: #80 Paladin Abilities (REMOVED, conflicts) #141 #143 Fighter Pips (order-dependent) #150 Fighter Abilities (safe) #180 Bard Songs (safe) #400 2H Strength (safe, has ToF detection) #750 #50 #12 (safe)
conflicts.theirComps: #40190 Revised Paladins #40300 Smite Evil #81100 Weapon Proficiency #60100 Minor Abilities #60200 Revised HLAs #81200 Weapon Styles
conflicts.source: SnA cn:80 adds MOPALC3/MOPALC5 to CLABPA01; ToF adds PALADIN_SMITE_EVIL/#paldise to same CLABs; SnA cn:400 has built-in tof_abilitys detection, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: No overlap . AK paladin overhauls (cn:3000-3011) SnA cn:80 (Paladin Abilities) modifies CLABPA01 — no selected AK component touches it. SnA cn:60/130/170/300
conflicts.myComps: #60 Inquisitor #80 Paladin Abilities #130 Blade #170 Archer #300 Weapon Styles

conflicts.reason: Both modify proficiencies, weapon styles, and HLAs
conflicts.theirComps: #4 Rebalanced Proficiencies #5 Rebalanced Weapon Styles #7 Rebalanced APR

conflicts.reason: SnA #750 Concentration Check has FORBID_COMPONENT for Spell Revisions #65. Also requires EEex and forbids Tactics Remix #60.

sum: 25 tweaks to skills and abilities: thieving skill adjustments, class ability changes, and proficiency modifications.

141.desc: Fighter multi-classes can reach Master (3 pips)

142.desc: Fighter multi-classes can reach High Master (4 pips)

143.desc: Fighter multi-classes can reach Grand Master (5 pips)

311.desc: Adds Heavy Armor and Spellcraft proficiencies (vanilla progression)

312.desc: Adds new proficiencies with accelerated progression

313.desc: Adds new proficiencies with NWN2-style progression

co.n: Add HLAs to IWDEE (Lefreut UI Required)
co.tp2n: Add HLAs to IWDEE (Lefreut UI Required)
co.no: IWDEE ONLY — REQUIRE_PREDICATE GAME_IS ~iwdee~. Will not install on EET. Do not include in EET presets.

co.n: Add New HLAs for ALL Classes and Kits
co.tp2n: Add New HLAs for ALL Classes and Kits
co.no: Adds 11 new epic HLAs (Epic Damage Reduction, Elemental Resistance, Toughness, Prowess, etc.). Requires BG2EE/EET or IWDEE with LeUI HLAs installed. Conflicts with ToF cn:60200.
Modifies Greater Whirlwind, Resist Magic, War Cry, Hardiness, Evasion. FORBID_COMPONENT with Spell Revisions #65. Conflicts with ToF cn:60200.

co.n: Add Concentration Check to Resist Spell Disruption
co.tp2n: Add Concentration Check to Resist Spell Disruption
co.no: Requires EEex. d20 + Luck + (CON/2) - 5 > Damage = resist disruption. FORBID_COMPONENT with Tactics Remix cn:60 and Spell Revisions cn:65.
Requires EEex. Gives bards Open Locks thief skill.

co.n: Bard Skills: Add Lockpicking and Find/Disarm Traps
co.no: Requires EEex. Gives bards Open Locks and Find/Disarm Traps thief skills.
Master specialization (3 slots) in all bladed weapons, +0.5 APR at levels 10 and 20. Modifies Blade CLAB table.
Modifies Skald kit abilities via CLAB table.
Increases bard song duration from 1 round to 1 turn. Redundant with ToF bard song changes.
Adds Second Wind (heal 1d10+level 1/day), Indomitable (save bonus at 9/13/17), Epic Weapon Focus and Epic Weapon Specialization HLAs. Modifies fighter CLAB.

co.tp2n: Allow Fighter Multiclasses to Achieve Master (3 pips) in Weapon Proficiencies
co.no: Allows fighter multi-classes to reach Master (3 pips). Modifies WEAPPROF.2DA. Conflicts with ToF cn:81100.
co.scn: Allow Fighter Multiclasses to Achieve Higher than Specialized (2 pips) in Weapons Proficiencies

co.n: Fighter Multi-Class Pips: High Master (4 pips)
co.tp2n: Allow Fighter Multiclasses to Achieve High Master (4 pips) in Weapon Proficiencies
co.no: Allows fighter multi-classes to reach High Master (4 pips). Modifies WEAPPROF.2DA. Conflicts with ToF cn:81100.
co.scn: Allow Fighter Multiclasses to Achieve Higher than Specialized (2 pips) in Weapons Proficiencies

co.n: Fighter Multi-Class Pips: Grand Master (5 pips)
co.tp2n: Allow Fighter Multiclasses to Achieve Grand Master (5 pips) in Weapon Proficiencies
co.no: Allows fighter multi-classes to reach Grand Master (5 pips). Modifies WEAPPROF.2DA. Conflicts with ToF cn:81100.
co.scn: Allow Fighter Multiclasses to Achieve Higher than Specialized (2 pips) in Weapons Proficiencies

co.no: Requires EEex. Gives monks Open Locks, Find/Disarm Traps, Detect Illusion thief skills. Adds Flurry of Blows and Perfect Self HLA.
Requires EEex. Adds Detect Illusions (100), cumulative 10% spell failure per hit, 25% Dispel Magic chance on hit. Modifies Wizard Slayer CLAB.

Adds Smite (1/day + CHA to attack/damage), Aura of Courage (3rd level), Sanctify Strikes HLA (+2 magic damage). Modifies CLABPA01. CONFLICTS with ToF cn:40190/40300 — both add Smite Evil to paladin CLABs with different resources.

co.n: Replace Inquisitor True Seeing for Detect Illusion Skill
co.tp2n: Replace Inquisitor True Seeing for Detect Illusion Skill
co.no: Requires EEex. Replaces True Seeing with Detect Illusion (100). Modifies Inquisitor CLAB.

co.n: Allow Inquisitor Kit to Cast Divine Spells
co.tp2n: Allow Inquisitor Kit to Cast Divine Spells
co.no: Removes Inquisitor's divine spell restriction. May conflict with F&P's inquisitor-as-subclass redesign.
Requires EEex. Once per day per 3 levels (clerics) / 4 levels (paladins), deals 2d6 + level + CHA modifier damage. Modifies Turn Undead ability.
Requires EEex. Replaces Turn Undead modal with Thieving Ability button for Cleric/Thief multiclass.

co.n: Update Archer to provide to hit and damage bonuses per the kit description
co.tp2n: Update Archer to provide to hit and damage bonuses per the kit description
co.no: Adjusts Archer kit to match its description. Modifies Archer CLAB. Conflicts with A7#ImprovedArcher — use one or the other.
Revises Two-Handed, Sword and Shield, Single-Weapon, and Two-Weapon styles. Modifies WSPATCK/WSDUAL/WSSHLD/WSSINGLE 2DA files.
Overhauls proficiency system with new proficiencies (Heavy Armor, Spellcraft, etc.) using vanilla progression rates. Modifies WEAPPROF.2DA extensively.
co.scn: Overhaul Proficiency System - Add New Proficiencies and Weapon Styles

co.no: Same proficiency overhaul with accelerated rates (warriors every 2, clerics/thieves every 3, mages every 4). FORBID_COMPONENT with ToF cn:20000. Modifies WEAPPROF.2DA extensively.
co.scn: Overhaul Proficiency System - Add New Proficiencies and Weapon Styles

co.no: Same proficiency overhaul with NWN2-style rates (fighters every 2, all others every 3). FORBID_COMPONENT with ToF cn:20000. Modifies WEAPPROF.2DA extensively.
co.scn: Overhaul Proficiency System - Add New Proficiencies and Weapon Styles

co.no: Two-handed attacks receive 1.5x Strength damage bonus (rounded down). Has built-in ToF detection.

advisories.reason: S&A inquisitor and turn undead changes may conflict with F&P's sphere system and class redesigns
advisories.myComps: #60 Inquisitor Detect Illusion #100 Inquisitor Divine Spells #120 Turn Undead Overhaul
advisories.theirComps: #80 Sphere System #31 Cleric Kits #35 #36 Paladin Kits

advisories.reason: Different domains (spells vs class abilities) but HLA and CLAB table modifications may overlap. Both used together . Install SubtleD Spell Tweaks before Skills and Abilities.
advisories.myComps: #700 PfNW/PfMW #710 New HLAs #720 Updated HLAs #750 Concentration #130 Blade #180 Bard Songs #300 Weapon Styles
advisories.theirComps: #10 Rebalanced Schools #30 High-Level Spells Penetrate MR #55 Cure Bypass Deflection
advisories.source: tp2 analysis — SubtleD modifies spell behavior, S&A modifies class abilities/HLAs. Overlap limited to shared CLAB/LU 2da files, 2026-03
